highlights: Saving is faster and safer - boards write to a temporary file first, so a failed save never damages your existing board.
Big boards save quickly - a 22 MB board saves in well under a second.
Copying large selections uses far less memory.
Reopening the board you already have open is now instant - no reloading or re-decoding images.
Switching between boards frees memory sooner, lowering peak usage.
Closing and returning Home no longer hangs - saves time out safely and keep your board open.
Fixed the duplicate R logo on File Explorer thumbnails - the preview now shows once, in the bottom-right corner.
